name: deaiify
description: Intercepts em-dashes and en-dashes in outbound replies. Rewrites via embedded LLM so sentences are properly restructured, not just character-swapped.

rewriteTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for the embedded rewrite run.

security-notes: Embedded LLM rewrite uses the active session model when available. No external API calls beyond the configured model provider. Ephemeral temp transcript file is cleaned up immediately. Fail-open design.
privacy-notes: Rewrite prompts are ephemeral and scoped to the current session. An ephemeral temp session transcript file is created for the embedded rewrite contract and removed immediately after the run.
attack-surface-reduction: Single hook path. No config-driven code execution. No network calls beyond the session model.
